headlines.description: — A last-minute interception by Foye Oluokun showed again the Atlanta Falcons are learning to win close games.
headlines.shortLinkText: Oluokun's last-minute pick saves Falcons' win over Lions

headlines.description: — Joe Burrow's franchise record-breaking 525-yard passing performance clearly meant something to the Cincinnati Bengals, who continued calling deep throws for him late in the fourth quarter with a 20-point lead against division rival Baltimore until...
headlines.shortLinkText: Burrow’s 525 yards, 4 TDs power Bengals past Ravens 41-21

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Minnesota Vikings

headlines.description: — Before Brandon Powell joined the Los Angeles Rams last month, his fifth team in four NFL seasons, he read books on the beach near his Florida home while waiting for yet another chance.
headlines.shortLinkText: Punt return TD sparks Rams in playoff-clinch win vs. Vikings

events.name: Buffalo Bills at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — With their season on the brink and several key players unavailable, the Buffalo Bills trudged into Sunday's pivotal matchup against the New England Patriots needing somebody to step up.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen's 3 TDs, McKenzie's big day push Bills past Patriots

events.name: Jacksonville Jaguars at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Zach Wilson ran like no other Jets quarterback in franchise history, tossed a touchdown pass to an offensive lineman, and outdueled Trevor Lawrence.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson, Jets hold on to edge Lawrence, Jaguars 26-21

events.name: New York Giants at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — The play was called “East Texas” in a nod to Jalen Hurts' and Lane Johnson's roots and — for a franchise that loves a bit of trickery —  all that was needed for it to work was for the right...
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurts keeps Eagles in playoff race in 34-10 win over Giants

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — As Buccaneers coach Bruce Arians watched Antonio Brown go through practice last week, he could tell the veteran wide receiver was in great shape and had some fresh legs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady, Bucs rout Panthers 32-6 to clinch NFC South title

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Houston Texans

headlines.description: — After a loss to the lowly Houston Texans on Sunday, Los Angeles Chargers coach Brandon Staley was quick to remind his players they still have plenty to play for.
headlines.shortLinkText: Texans run past Chargers 41-29, ding LA's playoff hopes

headlines.description: — Nearly a year after he last took a snap in a game, Nick Foles showed he still has some of that Super Bowl MVP talent in his right arm.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bears get late magic from Nick Foles to top Seahawks 25-24

events.name: Pittsburgh Steelers at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The chances that the Kansas City Chiefs would spend Sunday night celebrating their record sixth straight AFC West title seemed slim last week when Tyreek Hill and Travis Kelce headlined an outbreak of COVID-19 within the team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs rout stumbling Steelers 36-10 to clinch AFC West

events.name: Denver Broncos at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — With the Raiders trailing by six points at halftime Sunday, Josh Jacobs told the coaches to give him a chance to get into a rhythm, to make up for a lost fumble, and to put their trust in his running abilities.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raiders cling to playoff hopes with 17-13 win over Denver

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott and the Dallas Cowboys didn’t have to worry about the NFC East title anymore once they kicked off against Washington.
headlines.shortLinkText: Prescott, Cowboys celebrate with 56-14 rout of Washington
